title: Final Layout — Div and Span
description: Finalize your recipe website layout using div and span elements. Wrap major page sections in divs with descriptive class names (e.g., class="hero", class="recipes-section", class="form-section"). Use span elements for inline highlights like cooking time and difficulty level. Style the layout divs and spans with CSS to create a polished look.
starter_code:
# Recipe Collection Website — Step 8: Final Layout with Div and Span # Wrap sections in divs with classes. Use spans for inline highlights. html = """ My Recipes

My Recipe Collection

  • Home
  • Recipes
  • Submit Recipe

Classic Pancakes

Fluffy, golden pancakes perfect for a weekend breakfast.

Ingredients

  • 2 cups flour
  • 2 eggs
  • 1 cup milk

Instructions

  1. Mix dry ingredients
  2. Add wet ingredients and stir
  3. Cook on a hot pan until golden

Garden Salad

A fresh and healthy salad with seasonal vegetables.

Ingredients

  • Mixed greens
  • Cherry tomatoes
  • Cucumber

Instructions

  1. Wash and chop vegetables
  2. Toss together in a bowl
  3. Add dressing and serve

Submit a Recipe

© 2026 My Recipe Collection

""" print(html)
test_code: _lower = html.lower() assert ' elements' assert '' in _lower, 'Must include elements for inline highlights' _class_matches = [c for c in _lower.split('class="')[1:] if '"' in c] _class_names = [c.split('"')[0] for c in _class_matches] _div_classes = [c for c in _class_names if c != 'recipe-card'] assert len(_div_classes) >= 2, 'Must have at least 2 different class names on divs (besides recipe-card)' assert '' in _lower, 'Must keep navigation from previous step' assert 'class="recipe-card"' in _lower or "class='recipe-card'" in _lower, 'Must keep recipe cards' assert '
acceptance_criteria: Major page sections are wrapped in divs with descriptive class names
At least 2 different class names are used on layout divs (besides recipe-card)
Span elements are used for inline highlights (e.g., cooking time, difficulty)
Layout divs and spans are styled with CSS
Navigation, recipe cards, and form from previous steps are preserved
hints:
Wrap the welcome:

Welcome to my favorite recipes!
Style a span: .cook-time { background-color: #ffe4b5; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; }
